items.title: Champions League recap: Grading all 36 teams, plus...
items.summary: The league phase of the Champions League is over, culminating with a dramatic Matchday 8. Who was the best and worst in this stage of the competition?

items.title: Talking points: Mourinho's master class, biggest d...
items.summary: ESPN FC's writers pick out their highs and lows of the tournament to this point.

items.title: Mourinho: I apologized to Arbeloa over celebration...
items.summary: José Mourinho said he apologised to Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa for his celebrations in Benfica's 4-2 Champions League win on Wednesday

items.title: Brighton latest: No desire to sell Ayari as Forest bid rejected
Voormalig Ajax-talent Banel op zoek naar speelminuten op lager Engels niveau
items.summary: Jaydon Banel gaat het komende halfjaar in actie komen bij Derby County. De buitenspeler, die vorig jaar overkwam van Ajax, paste niet in de plannen van Burnley en gaat zijn minuten een niveau lager maken.

items.title: Aston Villa latest: Palace agree deal with Villa for Guessand
Forest latest: Bid for Ayari rejected by Brighton
Jong PSV stroomt verder leeg: Leipzig slaat toe bij Thomas
items.summary: Dele Thomas maakt spoedig de overstap van (Jong) PSV naar RB Leipzig. De achttienjarige aanvaller beschikte over een aflopend contract in Eindhoven, door een verkoop in de winter houdt PSV in ieder geval nog enkele tonnen over aan de linksbuiten.

items.title: Lachende Hoefkens: 'Kompany en ik hebben samen ook de opleiding gedaan'
items.summary: Carl Hoefkens moest donderdagmiddag lachen om de vergelijking tussen NAC Breda en Bayern München. In aanloop naar het Champions League-duel tussen PSV en de Duitse grootmacht werd zijn elftal plots naast Bayern gelegd. Dat maakte de Belg trots.

items.title: Napoli: Sterling 'financial demands' block move
items.summary: Napoli sporting director Giovanni Manna has said Raheem Sterling's "significant financial demands" could be an obstacle in doing a deal for the forward.

items.title: Pep: City panicked over Mourinho's UCL strategy
items.summary: Pep Guardiola revealed Manchester City were panicking over their Champions League hopes as Benfica pushed for a late goal against Real Madrid.

items.title: Dit kan Go Ahead Eagles verwachten van Braga
items.summary: Go Ahead Eagles treft met Braga een tegenstander die de weg omhoog gevonden heeft. De Portugezen hebben na een lastige start een uitstekende positie in de Europa League en pakken steeds meer punten in de competitie. Analyse van een balbezitsploeg met Pep Guardiola-invloeden.

items.title: Na weken van uitersten moet Burger toekijken tegen Bayern München
items.summary: Wouter Burger is niet van de partij tijdens het uitduel van 1899 Hoffenheim bij Bayern München. De Nederlander moet twee wedstrijden brommen naar aanleiding van de rode kaart die hij ontving tegen Werder Bremen.

items.title: Crystal Palace agree £50m Strand Larsen deal and close on Guessand loan
items.summary: Forwards in line to sign from Wolves and Aston Villa James Ward-Prowse seals loan move to Burnley Wolves have agreed to sell Jørgen Strand Larsen to Crystal Palace after receiving a bid totalling £50m for the Norway striker. The agent Jorge Mendes has been leading negotiations on behalf of Wolves, who have accepted an initial £45m, plus £5m in add-ons. Strand Larsen would represent Palace’s record buy, eclipsing the £35m they paid to take Brennan Johnson from Tottenham this month. Continue reading...

items.title: Champions League review: discontent for Real Madrid in a chaotic conclusion to group play
items.summary: Álvaro Arbeloa’s team have concerns as they look ahead to the knockout stages, while Jamie Carragher has concerns about the draw It was billed by broadcasters as “Matchday Mayhem”. Finally, after 17 of the 18 final day matches had finished, came a chaotic denouement. Not even José Mourinho’s long Champions League heritage had included a moment like this, though his wild celebration was familiar. Benfica were beating Real Madrid 3-2, and Mourinho’s former club were already dropping out of the top eight. “I was told [the scoreline] is enough, so let’s close the door,” said Mourinho. Continue reading...

items.title: Palhinha ready for the real Spurs to stand up after Champions League stroll
items.summary: Tottenham eased into the last 16 and the midfielder trusts their uplift will provide ‘a big jump’ in the Premier League It was a question most assuredly in keeping with the overall craziness of the situation. Tottenham: 14th in the Premier League, with two wins out of 14 some of their fans beginning to fret about relegation. Also out of both domestic cups. Tottenham: the fourth best team in Europe after the conclusion of the league phase of the Champions League. On a fast-track to the last 16. So, of course, it was put to João Palhinha as he left the stadium after Spurs’s convincing 2-0 win at Eintracht Frankfurt on Wednesday night. Can Spurs win the Champions League? The midfielder’s response was to chuckle. And then laugh a little more. “I know what you want to hear from me,” he said. Continue reading...

items.title: Brighton to reject £20m Forest bid for Ayari
items.summary: Brighton are set to reject a £20m offer from Nottingham Forest for midfielder Yasin Ayari.

items.title: West Ham latest: Hammers must 'move forward' without Paqueta, says Nuno
Palace agree £50m Strand Larsen deal as Forest chase Mateta
items.summary: Crystal Palace agree a deal in principle worth in the region of £50m to sign Wolves striker Jorgen Strand Larsen.

items.title: Why Steve Holland could be key to Man Utd's revival under Carrick
items.summary: Why former England and Chelsea coach Steve Holland could be the key appointment in new boss Michael Carrick's coaching team at Manchester United.
